analysis.name: orders_2023.csv
analysis.dataset_description: This file appears to contain a list of orders, including order IDs, customer IDs, amounts, currencies, and dates.

column_overview.name: customer_id
column_overview.inferred_role: Identifier for the customer who made the order

column_overview.name: amount
column_overview.inferred_role: Total amount of the order in the specified currency

column_overview.name: currency
column_overview.inferred_role: Currency used for the transaction (all USD in this sample)
column_overview.notes: All values are 'USD', which may indicate a single-currency dataset or a need to consider exchange rates if international transactions are expected.

column_overview.name: order_date
column_overview.inferred_role: Date when the order was made

analysis.summary: The file contains 20 rows of data, with all values in 'USD' currency.
key_problems: All amounts are numeric and do not appear to have any formatting issues.
recommendations: Consider adding a column for the order status (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) if it's relevant to your analysis or business needs.
confidence_notes: The sample size is relatively small (20 rows), which may not be representative of the entire dataset. Further investigation with a larger sample or more data would be beneficial for making conclusions about the dataset as a whole.
